title: Black Forest Labs releases Flux3: The first native multimodal foundation model for generating audio 20 seconds of synchronized audio-visual content at a time
excerpt: German artificial intelligence startup Black Forest Labs has officially released the multimodal foundation model Flux3. Built on the Self-Flow architecture, it
content_html:
German artificial intelligence startup Black Forest Labs has officially released the multimodal foundation model Flux3. Built on the Self-Flow architecture, it features dedicated image, video, audio, and motion codecs, integrating a unified understanding and generation of the physical world and digital environment.

The most striking feature is audio-video synchronization. Flux3 is the first multimodal model to support native audio generation, capable of outputting synchronized audio-video clips up to 20 seconds in length. Its capabilities cover text, image, and video-to-video conversion, transition based on keyframes, and multi-character dialogue. For a single model, combining "hearing" and "seeing" into one base means it is no longer just a specialist in images or videos.

In early testing, under settings of 720p resolution and 10-second clips, Flux3 defeated Luma Ray3.2 with a 93% win rate, and had a 77% advantage over Runway Gen-4.5; even when compared to top models like Seedance2.0 and Gemini Omni Flash, it still maintained a slight edge.

Motion has also been integrated into reality. Black Forest Labs, in collaboration with Mimic Robotics, developed the action model Flux-mimic for the robotics field, which is already running production task tests in an Audi factory—multimodal capabilities have moved from the screen to the production line. In terms of release rhythm, BFL has chosen to proceed in stages: Flux3Video has already been launched, and Flux3Image and the open-source weight version "Flux3Dev" will be released in the near future.

Built on the Self-Flow architecture, it features dedicated image, video, audio, and motion codecs, integrating a unified understanding and generation of the physical world and digital environment.

sentences.en: German artificial intelligence startup Black Forest Labs has officially released the multimodal foundation model Flux3.
sentences.zh: 德国人工智能初创公司Black Forest Labs正式发布多模态基础模型Flux3。

sentences.en: Built on the Self-Flow architecture, it features dedicated image, video, audio, and motion codecs, integrating a unified understanding and generation of the physical world and digital environment.
sentences.zh: 它建立在自流架构之上，具有专用的图像、视频、音频和运动编解码器，集成了对物理世界和数字环境的统一理解和生成。

Its capabilities cover text, image, and video-to-video conversion, transition based on keyframes, and multi-character dialogue. For a single model, combining "hearing" and "seeing" into one base means it is no longer just a specialist in images or videos.

sentences.zh: 最引人注目的功能是音视频同步。

sentences.en: Its capabilities cover text, image, and video-to-video conversion, transition based on keyframes, and multi-character dialogue.
sentences.zh: 其功能涵盖文本、图像和视频到视频的转换、基于关键帧的转换以及多字符对话。

sentences.en: For a single model, combining "hearing" and "seeing" into one base means it is no longer just a specialist in images or videos.
sentences.zh: 对于单一模型来说，将“听”和“看”合二为一意味着它不再只是图像或视频方面的专家。

blocks.html_en: In early testing, under settings of 720p resolution and 10-second clips, Flux3 defeated Luma Ray3.2 with a 93% win rate, and had a 77% advantage over Runway Gen-4.5; even when compared to top models like Seedance2.0 and Gemini Omni Flash, it still maintained a slight edge.

sentences.en: In early testing, under settings of 720p resolution and 10-second clips, Flux3 defeated Luma Ray3.2 with a 93% win rate, and had a 77% advantage over Runway Gen-4.5; even when compared to top models like Seedance2.0 and Gemini Omni Flash, it still maintained a slight edge.
sentences.zh: 在早期测试中，在720p分辨率和10秒片段的设置下，Flux3以93%的胜率击败了Luma Ray3.2，并且比Runway Gen-4.5有77%的优势；即使与Seedance2.0和Gemini Omni Flash等顶级型号相比，它仍然保持着轻微的优势。

In terms of release rhythm, BFL has chosen to proceed in stages: Flux3Video has already been launched, and Flux3Image and the open-source weight version "Flux3Dev" will be released in the near future.

Black Forest Labs, in collaboration with Mimic Robotics, developed the action model Flux-mimic for the robotics field, which is already running production task tests in an Audi factory—multimodal capabilities have moved from the screen to the production line.
sentences.zh: 黑森林实验室与Mimic Robotics合作，开发了用于机器人领域的动作模型Flux-mimic，该模型已经在奥迪工厂进行生产任务测试——多模态能力已经从屏幕转移到生产线。

sentences.en: In terms of release rhythm, BFL has chosen to proceed in stages: Flux3Video has already been launched, and Flux3Image and the open-source weight version "Flux3Dev" will be released in the near future.
sentences.zh: 在发布节奏上，BFL选择了分阶段进行：Flux3Video已经上线，Flux3Image以及开源权重版本“Flux3Dev”也将于近期发布。

content_html_zh:
德国人工智能初创公司Black Forest Labs正式发布多模态基础模型Flux3。 它建立在自流架构之上，具有专用的图像、视频、音频和运动编解码器，集成了对物理世界和数字环境的统一理解和生成。

最引人注目的功能是音视频同步。 Flux3 是第一个支持原生音频生成的多模态模型，能够输出长度长达 20 秒的同步音视频剪辑。 其功能涵盖文本、图像和视频到视频的转换、基于关键帧的转换以及多字符对话。 对于单一模型来说，将“听”和“看”合二为一意味着它不再只是图像或视频方面的专家。

在早期测试中，在720p分辨率和10秒片段的设置下，Flux3以93%的胜率击败了Luma Ray3.2，并且比Runway Gen-4.5有77%的优势；即使与Seedance2.0和Gemini Omni Flash等顶级型号相比，它仍然保持着轻微的优势。

运动也已融入现实。 黑森林实验室与Mimic Robotics合作，开发了用于机器人领域的动作模型Flux-mimic，该模型已经在奥迪工厂进行生产任务测试——多模态能力已经从屏幕转移到生产线。 在发布节奏上，BFL选择了分阶段进行：Flux3Video已经上线，Flux3Image以及开源权重版本“Flux3Dev”也将于近期发布。
